html:
Exclusive to:
Bumper Kits are items that can be placed on the edge of boats (all Floating Platforms except Ice Boats) to provide protection from collision damage.

Contents

  • 1 Kelp Bumper
  • 2 Shell Bumper
  • 3 Crab King Bumper
  • 4 Gallery

Kelp Bumper

StructureItem

The Kelp Bumper Kit is a craftable Item in the Seafaring filter introduced in the The Curse of Moon Quay update. It requires 3 Kelp Fronds and 3 Cut Grass to craft. It has 20 durability, which provides a small protection for the raft from collision damage. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use Kelp Fronds to repair it.

Shell Bumper

StructureItem

The Shell Bumper Kit is a hardened version of the bumper. It requires 3 Broken Shells and a Rope to craft. It has 40 durability. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use a Broken Shell to repair it.

Crab King Bumper

StructureItem

“A rock-like bumper that doesn't take damage when bumping into land. Take that, land!”

-

The Crab King Bumper is the strongest version of the bumpers. The Crab King drops 8 Bumper Kits upon defeat. It has 150 durability. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use Rocks, Cut Stone, or Stone Walls to repair it. They are also immune to damage from bumping into land.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Bumpers shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Bumpers shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Bumper test variant
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Bumper Kits are items that can be placed on the edge of boats (all Floating Platforms except Ice Boats) to provide protection from collision damage.
Contents
1 Kelp Bumper
2 Shell Bumper
3 Crab King Bumper

Object Info
Repaired By:

Kelp Bumper Kit
"Protect your boat - with kelp!"
Object Info

Filters

"boat_bumper_kelp_kit"
StructureItem
“It won't save the boat from everything, but it sure kelps.”
–Wilson
“Ewww, it's slimy!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang feels better now.”
–Wolfgang
“It will only prolong the inevitable.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE SHIELDED MY BOAT WITH EXPENDABLE ORGANIC MATTER”
–WX-78
“A thick barrier of Nereocystis luetkeana.”
–Wickerbottom
“There ya go, nice and safe.”
–Woodie
“I don't know if the smell is worth the protection it offers.”
–Maxwell
“My vessel is well defended.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps the boat from getting hurt.”
–Webber
“A helpful bit of garnish for the boat, non?”
–Warly
“Keeps Floaty safe”
–Wormwood
“Slimy, but it'll do for securin' the boat some more.”
–Winona
“Some friendly help from fronds of kelp.”
–Wortox
“Pretty decorations!”
–Wurt
“Don't worry Woby, I'm really good at sailing. That's just a precaution!”
–Walter
“Anything to prolong the life of my boat.”
–Wanda
“A soon-to-be boat bumper.”
–Wilson
“I guess building some bumpers is better than sinking.”
–Willow
“Will keep boat safe.”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose I should make myself useful.”
–Wendy
“FOR BUILDING AN... ACCEPTABLE BUMPER”
–WX-78
“It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.”
–Wickerbottom
“A bit of padding might be a good idea.”
–Woodie
“Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.”
–Maxwell
“It shall shield my vessel fröm harm.”
–Wigfrid
“Now we can play bumper boats!”
–Webber
“I will feel a bit safer with an extra layer wrapped around my boat.”
–Warly
“Will help protect Floaty”
–Wormwood
“Extra protection's always good, 'specially on water.”
–Winona
“But idle hands are such good playthings!”
–Wortox
“Gonna decorate boat, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's always best to be prepared!”
–Walter
“It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ đệm cản là những vật phẩm có thể được đặt ở mép thuyền (tất cả các Bệ nổi ngoại trừ Thuyền băng) để bảo vệ khỏi hư hỏng do va chạm.
title: Bumpers
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
Bumper Kits are items that can be placed on the edge of boats (all [[Floating Platform]]s except [[Ice Boat]]s) to provide protection from collision damage.

The '''Kelp Bumper Kit''' is a craftable [[:Category:Items|Item]] in the Seafaring filter introduced in the ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. It requires 3 [[Kelp Fronds]] and 3 [[Cut Grass]] to craft. It has 20 durability, which provides a small protection for the raft from collision damage. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use Kelp Fronds to repair it.
{{Clear}}
